globalContext: This project is an AI-powered code analysis tool for Visual Studio Code, designed to enhance developers' understanding of their code by providing insights into complexity, issues, and potential security vulnerabilities. The architecture consists of several key components: `ResultStore.ts` manages the storage and retrieval of file analysis results; `UnderstandingGenerator.ts` and `ProblemsReporter.ts` generate documentation and reports respectively; `StatusBarManager.ts` and `DiagnosticsPublisher.ts` update the VS Code status bar and publish diagnostics, respectively. The core scanning capabilities are provided by classes like `ComplexityScanner.ts`, `StaticScanner.ts`, `AiScanner.ts`, and `DuplicateScanner.ts`, each tailored for specific types of analysis. Rules for various languages such as Python, JavaScript, Java, and React are defined in their respective rule files. The project also includes a graph-based impact analysis system with classes like `FlowTracer.ts`, `LiveImpactBar.ts`, and `CodeGraphBuilder.ts`. Finally, the extension orchestrates all these components through `AnalysisOrchestrator.ts` and provides user-facing features via `DashboardProvider.ts` and `CodeActionsProvider.ts`.

src/config/ConfigManager.ts.summary: Reads and manages VS Code workspace settings for AI analysis configuration.

symbols.name: ConfigManager
symbols.summary: Manages configuration settings for the application, providing methods to retrieve various configuration values.

methods.name: cfg
methods.summary: Retrieves the VS Code workspace configuration object for 'codeSec'.

methods.name: getAiProvider
methods.summary: Returns the configured AI backend provider (e.g., ollama, openrouter). Defaults to 'ollama' if not set.

methods.name: getAiModel
methods.summary: Returns the configured model name for the AI. Uses the provider's default if not specified.

methods.name: getAiApiKey
methods.summary: Provides the API key for cloud-based AI providers. Returns an empty string if no key is needed (e.g., for Ollama).

methods.name: getAiBaseUrl
methods.summary: Overrides the default base URL for AI requests if running on a different port. Defaults to an empty string if not set.

methods.name: isAiEnabled
methods.summary: Determines whether AI analysis should be enabled. Defaults to true, allowing AI calls unless explicitly disabled.

methods.name: isStaticEnabled
methods.summary: Enables or disables the execution of built-in static regex rules for code analysis. Defaults to true.

methods.name: getComplexityThreshold
methods.summary: Sets the complexity score threshold above which functions will be flagged. Defaults to 10 if not specified.

methods.name: getDuplicateThreshold
methods.summary: Defines the minimum line length below which blocks won't be flagged as duplicates. Defaults to 6 lines.

methods.name: getLanguages
methods.summary: Lists the programming languages that should be analyzed by the application. Defaults to a list of common languages.

methods.name: shouldAnalyzeOnSave
methods.summary: Determines if code analysis should be triggered automatically when a file is saved, defaulting to true.

src/AnalysisOrchestrator.ts.summary: Coordinates four scanners to analyze code, orchestrating a two-phase process for static and AI-driven analysis.

symbols.name: AnalysisOrchestrator
symbols.summary: Coordinates the four scanners (static, complexity, duplicate, and AI) to analyze a document, persisting results in two phases: static (instant) and AI (background).

methods.name: constructor
methods.summary: Initializes the orchestrator with dependencies like store, config, scanners, and an onComplete callback. Sets up maps for timers and running AI tasks.

methods.name: analyze
methods.summary: Analyzes a given text document by checking if it's supported and not a URI scheme other than 'file'. Determines whether to run analysis immediately or debounce based on provided milliseconds.

methods.name: runPhased
methods.summary: Executes the analysis in two phases: static (immediate) and AI (background). Merges AI findings into static results before saving and notifying completion.

methods.name: runAiPhase
methods.summary: Runs the AI scanner asynchronously, filters out duplicate issues from static results, merges them, and updates the store if the document is still open.

methods.name: removeCrossRulesetDuplicates
methods.summary: Removes duplicate issues across different rule sets, keeping the most specific one.

methods.name: filterAiDuplicates
methods.summary: Filters out AI-generated issues that are already covered by static rules, using a line window and concept matching.

methods.name: sameRootConcept
methods.summary: Determines if two messages describe the same security or quality concept based on predefined groups of synonyms.

methods.name: keyWords
methods.summary: Extracts meaningful keywords from an issue message, stripping filler words to improve comparison.

methods.name: deduplicate
methods.summary: Removes exact duplicate issues on the same line, ensuring no redundant alerts.

methods.name: debounced
methods.summary: Debounces analysis requests for a document, running them after a delay to avoid excessive processing.

methods.name: dispose
methods.summary: method "dispose" defined in src/AnalysisOrchestrator.ts at line 283.

src/context/FileSummarizer.ts.summary: Generates and caches one-line AI summaries for files in a workspace.

symbols.name: FileSummarizer
symbols.summary: A class that generates and caches one-line AI summaries for files in a workspace, skipping already cached files.

methods.name: constructor
methods.summary: Initializes the FileSummarizer with an AI scanner and VS Code extension context. Sets up caching mechanisms.

methods.name: summarizeWorkspace
methods.summary: Asynchronously summarizes every file in the workspace, skipping those already cached. Uses progress reporting and handles AI unavailability.

methods.name: getSummaries
methods.summary: Returns current summaries as a flat map of file paths to their summaries.

methods.name: loadCache
methods.summary: Loads cached file summaries from disk if available, otherwise starts fresh.

methods.name: saveCache
methods.summary: Saves the current cache of file summaries to disk for future use.

methods.name: getCachePath
methods.summary: Determines the path where the cache file should be stored based on the extension's global storage URI.

methods.name: hashString
methods.summary: Generates a hash value from a string, used to check if file content has changed since last summary.
